name: 4uPDF
_comment_onboardingMarkers: Detect a REAL onboarding wall (page blocked until you act), NOT the global header CTA. 4uPDF tools are open + client-side, so the generic 'Sign up'/'Log in'/'Upgrade' chrome must not trigger GATED. Inline Pro upsells ('Sign in for high-DPI', 'Upgrade to unlock') are not walls either — excluded. G-4UPDF-JOURNEY-FP-001.
onboardingMarkers: Sign in to (access|view|continue)|Log ?in to (access|view|continue)|You must (sign|log) ?in|Please (sign|log) ?in to (access|view|continue)|Members only|Restricted access
_comment_emptyStateMarkers: Real empty states only. The upload dropzone ('Drop a PDF', 'Choose file') is expected tool content, not emptiness — it belongs in validContentMarkers instead.
